introSection:
Boogie-woogie Space Coaster (Japanese: ブギウギスペースコースター) was a Senyo Kogyo steel roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. The ride featured several tunnels and the option to ride in a backwards-facing car.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride featured a large blue triangle in the center in which the track passed through multiple times in tunnels.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: Blue track and dark blue supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The last two cars of each train faced backwards.

fullText:
Boogie-woogie Space Coaster (Japanese: ブギウギスペースコースター) was a Senyo Kogyo steel roller coaster located at Space World in Fukuoka, Japan. The ride featured several tunnels and the option to ride in a backwards-facing car.

The ride closed on 31 December 2017 alongside the rest of Space World.

The ride featured a large blue triangle in the center in which the track passed through multiple times in tunnels.

Blue track and dark blue supports.

The last two cars of each train faced backwards.
